title: ischaemum barbatum var. arfakense
intro: Ischaemum barbatum var. arfakense, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ischaemum barbatum var. arfakense include treating fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is also used to make herbal teas, infusions, and salves.
